title: Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri
tagline: Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri, Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir is a Hindu temple dedicated to Sai Baba of Shirdi.
overview.description: Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir is a Hindu temple dedicated to Sai Baba of Shirdi. It is located at Dharmapuri in the Karimnagar district of Telangana in India. The temple is located on the banks of the Godavari River. The temple was built for the Shri Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir Trust by the trustees Shri V. Narsimha Shastry and his youngest son V.N. Pravin Shastry to spread the message of Sai Baba of Shirdi.

topPlaces.name: Vizianagaram Fort
topPlaces.description: Vizianagaram fort is an early 18th-century fort in the city of Vizianagaram in northeastern Andhra Pradesh, South India. It was built by Vijaya Rama Raju, the Maharaja of Vizianagaram in 1713.

topPlaces.name: Kanapaka
topPlaces.description: Kanapaka is a census town in Vizianagaram district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Vizianagaram
topPlaces.description: Vizianagaram, also known as Vijayanagaram, is a city and the headquarters of the Vizianagaram district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in the Eastern Ghats, about 24 km (15 mi) west of the Bay of Bengal and 40 km (25 mi) north-northeast of Visakhapatnam.

topPlaces.name: Vizianagaram Estate
topPlaces.description: Vizianagaram Estate was a zamindari of the Madras Presidency in India. The name is derived from its founder Raja Vijayaram Raj who established a sovereign kingdom by claiming independence from the kingdom of Jeypore in 1711.

topPlaces.name: Gajularega
topPlaces.description: Gajularega is a census town in Vizianagaram district in the state of Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Vizianagaram mandal
topPlaces.description: Vizianagaram mandal is one of the 34 mandals in Vizianagaram district of Andhra Pradesh, India. Vizianagaram city is the headquarters of the mandal.

topPlaces.name: Pedatadivada
topPlaces.description: Pedatadivada is a village located in Denkada mandal of Vizianagaram District, Uttarandhra, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is located 3 km from Vizianagaram.

topPlaces.name: Chintalavalasa
topPlaces.description: Chintalavalasa is a census town in Vizianagaram district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Denkada mandal of Vizianagaram revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (43 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri?
faq.a: Stays in Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sai Shiva Balaji Mandir, Dharmapuri?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vizianagaram Fort, Kanapaka, Vizianagaram, Vizianagaram Estate, Gajularega.
